title: eragrostis planiculmis
intro: Eragrostis planiculmis, also known as plains lovergrass, is a type of grass native to the grasslands and prairies of North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis planiculmis include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis planiculmis are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
